Records.authors: Spiering, Anne, Wilhelm, Matthias, Zhang, Chi
Records.description: The general planar dual-conformally invariant four-dimensional double-pentagon tensor integral with numerator (N_L,X_0)(N_R,X_0p), N_L (N_R) orthogonal to all X_i in L (R) respectively, in massless N=4 SYM. Depends on 17 independent cross ratios. Obtained from a six-dimensional scalar double pentagon with doubled middle propagator via the operator hat{D} of eq:dpDO, then related to an eight-dimensional octagon via (1+partial_L). Admits a one-fold integral representation over hexagon integrals (eq: int_rep_dp) containing 16 elliptic curves for the 16 double-box subtopologies; symbol determined here.
